---
name: Research Task
about: Propose an experiment, analysis, or research extension
title: "[RESEARCH] "
assignees: ""
---

## Objective

Describe the proposed experiment, analysis, implementation, or research extension.

## Research Question

State the research question or technical objective.

## Motivation

Explain why this task is relevant to the project.

## Proposed Method

Describe the data, tools, experimental design, metrics, baselines, and expected outputs.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The objective is clearly defined.
- [ ] Required data and dependencies are identified.
- [ ] The procedure is reproducible.
- [ ] Expected outputs are specified.
- [ ] Limitations and risks are documented.

## Related Material

Link related issues, papers, datasets, documentation, or pull requests.
